title: German Chocolate Fondue
description: A rich and creamy fondue made with white chocolate, perfect for dipping fruit or cake. This German-inspired dessert is a delightful twist on a classic treat.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the cream over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Remove the cream from the heat and add in the white chocolate, stirring until melted and smooth.
Add in the butter and vanilla extract, stirring until fully incorporated.
Stir in the powdered sugar until dissolved.
Transfer the fondue to a fondue pot or a small bowl and serve immediately.
Dip your favorite fruits or cakes into the fondue for a delightful treat.
